resultList.dtldesc: 3 BHK Apartment for Sale in Madhapur, Hyderabad::::Positioned in one of Hyderabad’s most prominent residential and commercial hubs, this spacious 3 BHK apartment is located in Madhapur, an area well known for its proximity to HITEC City, strong infrastructure and excellent connectivity. Set within the established Fortune Tower residential complex, the property offers a balanced combination of comfort, accessibility and community living, making it suitable for both self-use and long-term investment.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment has a super built-up area of approximately 2455 sq. ft. and is situated on the 2nd floor of a well-maintained 16-storey building comprising around 256 flats. It is a ready-to-move resale property and comes with semi-furnished interiors. The layout includes three generously sized bedrooms and three bathrooms, designed to support comfortable family living. The living and dining areas are well separated, enhancing privacy and functional flow. The kitchen is modular and equipped with a chimney and piped gas connection. Flooring throughout the apartment is finished with vitrified tiles, offering durability and a clean contemporary appearance. The apartment is vastu compliant and east facing, and it enjoys pleasant views overlooking the garden and park areas within the complex.::::Facilities::::The property provides two covered car parking spaces and benefits from 24-hour water supply along with 100 percent power backup. The building is equipped with three lifts and offers comprehensive safety features including round-the-clock security personnel and CCTV surveillance. Residents have access to a wide range of lifestyle amenities such as a swimming pool, gymnasium, community hall, conference hall, table tennis court and ample common parking areas. Additional conveniences within the complex include a pharmacy, kirana shop and salon, contributing to everyday ease of living.::::Locality::::Located adjacent to the Indian Oil petrol pump, the property enjoys excellent visibility and accessibility. The metro station is approximately a five-minute walk away, ensuring seamless public transport connectivity. Markets are located directly opposite the property, while reputed schools and hospitals are within a short driving distance of around four kilometres. Banks, ATMs, supermarkets and other essential services are readily available in the immediate vicinity. Madhapur’s strong rental demand and proximity to major IT corridors further enhance the overall appeal of this well-located apartment.

Situated on the 9th floor the apartment is fully furnished and thoughtfully designed with spacious interiors premium finishes and modern conveniences. The property is ideal for families seeking an upscale residence in one of Hyderabad's most sought after neighbourhoods. The sale price of the property is 8 Cr.::::::::Property Specifications::::::::The apartment features 4 spacious bedrooms along with 5 bathrooms and 1 servant bathroom making a total of 6 bathrooms. Four bathrooms are attached to the bedrooms while one powder room and one servant toilet add extra convenience. All bathrooms are designed in western style and include geysers shower cubicles and glass partitioned bath areas.There are 2 spacious balconies offering panoramic city views along with 1 utility balcony overlooking the botanical garden creating a refreshing and peaceful atmosphere. The living spaces are lavishly furnished and include a 12 seater sofa set a single seater sofa with ottoman center table bookshelf bar counter TV cabinet and multiple display consoles. The drawing room features an additional 6 seater sofa fireplace mantlepiece and premium décor elements which elevate the luxury appeal of the home.The kitchen is fully modular and equipped with a 5 burner hob chimney island table quartz platform stainless steel sink and extensive storage cabinets. Piped gas connection is also available. The apartment is perfectly vastu compliant with a north facing entrance ensuring positive energy and natural airflow.::::::::Facilities::::::::The apartment offers premium facilities including 100 percent power backup 24 hour security CCTV surveillance MyGate app access covered parking for 2 cars lifts and uninterrupted water supply. The residential complex provides a world class lifestyle.::::Locality::::::::Located in Gachibowli Hyderabad the property enjoys outstanding connectivity to major IT hubs educational institutions healthcare centres shopping malls and entertainment zones. Prominent nearby landmarks include CHIREC School Apollo Hospital KIMS AIG CARE Hospital Omega Hospital and Sri Sri Holistic Hospital. Popular malls such as Sharat City Capital Mall Atrium Mall and Kondapur Market are located nearby. The apartment also enjoys excellent connectivity to Raidurg Metro Station Lingampally Railway Station and Hitech City Railway Station making commuting extremely convenient. The locality is well served by public transport and is considered one of the most premium residential destinations in Hyderabad.
